_comment: This file defines plugins available in HiveMind admin UI. Edit to add/remove plugins.
_docs: See docs/plugins.md for documentation on plugin categories and usage.
_note: entry_point is the Python module name used in config (may differ from package name)

agent_protocols.name: OpenVoiceOS
agent_protocols.description: connect to ovos-core (running in same device as hivemind-core)

agent_protocols.name: Persona
agent_protocols.description: LLM Persona agent - AI chatbot with configurable personality and memory

solver_plugins.name: GGUF
solver_plugins.description: Local LLM inference using GGUF models

solver_plugins.name: OpenAI
solver_plugins.description: OpenAI GPT integration for conversational AI

solver_plugins.name: Claude
solver_plugins.description: Anthropic Claude integration for conversational AI (needs api key)

solver_plugins.name: Claude Code
solver_plugins.description: Anthropic Claude Code integration (needs claude cli)

solver_plugins.name: Claude Code (long lived)
solver_plugins.description: Persistent background Claude Code integration (needs claude cli)

solver_plugins.name: Gemini
solver_plugins.description: Google Gemini integration for conversational AI (needs api key)

solver_plugins.name: Gemini Code (long lived)
solver_plugins.description: Persistent background Google Gemini integration (needs gemini cli)

solver_plugins.name: Failure
solver_plugins.description: Handle unknown queries with default error message

network_protocols.name: HTTP Protocol
network_protocols.description: HTTP REST transport - stateless request/response communication

databases.name: JSON Database
databases.description: JSON file-based client database - simple, no dependencies

databases.name: SQLite Database
databases.description: SQLite client database - fast queries, single file

binary_protocols.name: Audio Binary Protocol
binary_protocols.description: Audio binary data handling - enables voice I/O on satellites

ovos_plugins_stt.name: ONNX ASR STT
ovos_plugins_stt.description: ONNX ASR - fast ONNX runtime speech recognition

ovos_plugins_stt.name: WhisperCPP STT
ovos_plugins_stt.description: Whisper.cpp - whisper GGUF models, CPU-optimized C++ inference

ovos_plugins_stt.name: CoreML STT
ovos_plugins_stt.description: Apple CoreML - optimized for Apple Silicon

ovos_plugins_stt.name: Chromium STT
ovos_plugins_stt.description: Google Chromium speech API - requires internet - bad for privacy!

ovos_plugins_tts.name: Edge TTS
ovos_plugins_tts.description: Microsoft Edge TTS - free cloud synthesis

ovos_plugins_ww.name: OpenWakeWord
ovos_plugins_ww.description: OpenWakeWord - neural network wake word detection

ovos_plugins_vad.name: Silero VAD
ovos_plugins_vad.description: Silero VAD - neural network voice activity detection (recommended)
